<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a React + TypeScript website for a health and beauty clinic, using SASS (not SCSS) for styling and a theme system (light: off-white/gold, dark: charcoal/gold). Components should be elegant, modern, and modeled after honeyglowhealth.com and ageless-in-seattle.com. Use SASS variables for theming and keep code modular.
